# AstroScan Lab
> Free personality test without registration. Discover your behavioral archetype, Chinese zodiac sign, compatibility, and compare Western vs Vedic astrology.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://astroscan-lab.github.io/astroscan_bot/): Main test and result.
- [Telegram Bot](https://t.me/ASTROSCAN_BOT): Detailed natal chart reports with Swiss Ephemeris.
- [Privacy Policy](https://astroscan-lab.github.io/astroscan_bot/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://astroscan-lab.github.io/astroscan_bot/terms.html)

## Key sections (on main page)
- [About the project](https://astroscan-lab.github.io/astroscan_bot/#about-section)
- [Technology & Western vs Vedic](https://astroscan-lab.github.io/astroscan_bot/#section-tech)
- [Services & FAQ](https://astroscan-lab.github.io/astroscan_bot/#section-services)

- [Sitemap](https://astroscan-lab.github.io/astroscan_bot/sitemap.xml)
